generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensorHeatbed : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor measuring heatbed temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataHeatbed
]

instance TemperatureSensorChamber : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor measuring internal chamber air temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataChamber
]

instance TemperatureSensorAmbient : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor measuring external ambient temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataAmbient
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on custom PCB"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan with airflow 0.02 m³/s controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through low-level driver"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller running low-level drivers and DT services"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuator control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "12V/24V power supply for heatbed and fan"
]

instance MOSFETs : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MOSFET transistors used for heatbed control on custom PCB"
]

instance Optocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Optocouplers for electrical isolation in actuator control circuit"
]

instance TemperatureDataHeatbed : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorHeatbed
]

instance TemperatureDataChamber : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorChamber
]

instance TemperatureDataAmbient : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorAmbient
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from heatbed sensor with ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataHeatbed
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ChamberTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time chamber air temperature readings with ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataChamber
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ambient temperature readings with ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataAmbient
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "2-parameter thermal model for air temperature prediction with uniform distribution"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "4-parameter thermal model including heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ScipyCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization in thermal model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker handling sensor data transmission between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based simulation engine for thermal model execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance PCBDesignTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design software for creating custom circuit boards"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance OneWireProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol implementation for sensor communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models (Model A and B)"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight, OperationalAdjustmentAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAlertInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms to update model parameters based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterUpdateInsight, BangBangControllerAdjustmentAction
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values for system optimization"
]

instance SafetyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time alerts for temperature deviations beyond safety thresholds"
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated thermal model parameters from calibration process"
]

instance OperationalAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heatbed and fan control based on simulation outputs"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BangBangControllerAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust bang-bang controller parameters LL, UL, H, C based on calibration updates"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container-based thermal incubator system with 0.03 m³ volume"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensorHeatbed, TemperatureSensorChamber, TemperatureSensorAmbient, RaspberryPi4ModelB, CustomPCB, PowerSupply, MOSFETs, Optocouplers
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates them into GPIO signals for hardware control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system with RabbitMQ as communication backbone, low-level driver for hardware interaction, controller for logic execution, and simulation models; data flows via RabbitMQ between PT and DT components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; the DT integrates models into the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated against experimental data; Model B showed better thermal inertia prediction; calibration minimizes residual error via Scipy's non-linear least squares solver."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) for inter-component communication; 1-Wire bus for temperature sensors connected to Raspberry Pi GPIO."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hosting RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver; on-premises deployment."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed."
]
